title: Set Default Cluster
content:
# Set Default Cluster For each Kelvin Instance you can set one default cluster. The default cluster will be used when adding Assets to any Kelvin SmartApp™. Documentation on Adding Assets in the Kelvin UI can be found in the [Operations Tools here](../../../../operations-tools/kelvin-smartapps-page/how-to/assets/smartapp-details-tab-assets-add-asset.md). Field | Description ---------------------|------------------------------------------ cluster | The `name` of the default Cluster for Kelvin SmartApps™ deployment. The ., _ and - characters are also allowed to separate words instead of a space but not at the beginning or end). max_resources | The maximum number of Assets that can be assigned to each Workload. When the max number is reached, a new workload will be automatically deployed for Kelvin SmartApps™ and the new Assets.
=== "Kelvin UI" This can not be set in the Kelvin UI. === "Kelvin API" ```bash title="API cURL Example" linenums="1" curl -X "POST" \ "https:///api/v4/instance/settings/app-manager-planner-rules/update" \ -H "Authorization: Bearer " \ -H "Accept: application/json" \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -d '{ "payload": { "cluster": "aws-cluster", "max_resources": 1 } }' ``` === "Kelvin API Client (Python)" ```python title="API Client (Python) Example" linenums="1" from kelvin.api.client import Client # Login client = Client(url="https://", username="") client.login(password="") # Set or Update the Default Cluster in an Instance response = client.instance.update_instance_settings_app_manager_planner_rules(data={ "payload": { "cluster": "aws-cluster", "max_resources": 16 } }) print(f'Updated planner rules with default cluster {response.payload.cluster} with a maximum resource limit of {response.payload.max_resources}') ``` You will receive an output like this; ```bash title="API Client (Python) Example Response" linenums="1" Updated planner rules with default cluster aws-cluster with a maximum resource limit of 16 ```
summary: For each Kelvin Instance you can set one default cluster.
